steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content:
For a random selection, probability equals the ratio of favorable outcomes to total outcomes.

Favorable outcomes (rocky planets): 4
Total outcomes (all planets): 8
$$P(\text{rocky}) = \frac{\text{number of rocky planets}}{\text{total number of planets}} = \frac{4}{8}$$

steps.title: Simplify the fraction
steps.content:
Reduce the fraction by dividing both numerator and denominator by 4:
$$\frac{4}{8} = \frac{4 \div 4}{8 \div 4} = \frac{1}{2}$$
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
